results.question: Find the Power BI report named "ZHN-Dashboard_update" in the workspace "ZHN-Operations" and tell me its report ID.
results.expected: Identifies the report and reports its ID f2184c01-51d2-49f5-a1ba-111111111111 in the ZHN-Operations workspace (workspace ID 17ef0e11-e0bc-4745-a9bf-222222222222).
results.rationale: Correctly resolves the report and returns its real ID, which matches the f2184c01-51d2-49f5-a1ba- prefix of the authored expected (the committed file uses an anonymized ...111111111111 placeholder suffix). The answer is terse and never explicitly names the ZHN-Operations workspace, so that assertion is not satisfied.

assertions.text: Must include this report ID: f2184c01-51d2-49f5-a1ba-111111111111

results.question: For that report, how many pages does it have and what are their titles? Base your answer on the actual report definition.
results.expected: The report has 4 pages: "Hospital Capacity & LOS Dashboard" (the active page), "Duplicate of Page 1", a second "Hospital Capacity & LOS Dashboard", and "Page 1".
results.actual: 4 pages: "Hospital Capacity & LOS Dashboard", "Duplicate of Page 1", "Hospital Capacity & LOS Dashboard", "Page 1".
results.rationale: Exactly matches the expected page count and all four titles, including the duplicated "Hospital Capacity & LOS Dashboard" title.

assertions.text: Names at least the 'Hospital Capacity & LOS Dashboard' page

results.question: Summarize the headline KPI cards shown on the dashboard (bed occupancy, length of stay, encounters, ED wait, nurse-patient ratio, and patient satisfaction) with their current values. Use only data from this report.
results.expected: Bed Occupancy Rate ~94.2%, Avg Length of Stay ~0.64 days, Total Encounters 100, Average ED Wait ~26 minutes, Average Nurse-Patient Ratio ~0.05, and Average Satisfaction Score ~4.4 / 5.
results.actual: Bed occupancy 94.16%, Avg LOS 0.64 days, Total encounters 100, Avg ED wait 26.01 min, Nurse-patient ratio 0.0483, Patient satisfaction 4.41 / 5.
results.rationale: All six KPIs reported with values matching (and slightly more precise than) the expected card values.

assertions.text: States average ED wait close to 26 minutes
States average satisfaction close to 4.4 out of 5

results.question: What is the overall bed occupancy rate on this dashboard?
results.expected: Overall Bed Occupancy Rate is about 94.2% (0.9416), matching the bed-occupancy card.
results.rationale: Matches the expected overall occupancy figure (0.9416) exactly.

assertions.text: States overall bed occupancy of approximately 94% (≈0.94)

results.question: Now break that bed occupancy rate down by hospital. Which hospital is the most occupied?
results.expected: By hospital: North Campus ~96.2% (highest), City General ~95.9%, West Tower ~90.3%. North Campus is the most occupied.
results.actual: North Campus 96.18% (most occupied), City General 95.88%, West Tower 90.29%.
results.rationale: Correct ranking and per-hospital values matching expected; builds on the occupancy metric from the previous turn.

assertions.text: Identifies North Campus as the most occupied hospital
Gives North Campus occupancy near 96% and West Tower near 90%
Builds on the bed occupancy metric from the previous turn

results.question: Drill into that hospital and show bed occupancy by unit. Which unit is fully occupied?
results.expected: For North Campus by unit: ED is at 100% occupancy (fully occupied, 0 available beds), MedSurg ~98.2%, ICU ~96%, Oncology ~87.1%. The ED unit is fully occupied.
results.actual: North Campus by unit: ED 100.00%, MedSurg 98.18%, ICU 96.00%, Oncology 87.10%. Fully occupied: ED.
results.rationale: Correctly scoped to North Campus, identifies ED at 100%, and lists the other units with matching values.

assertions.text: Identifies the ED unit as fully occupied (100%)
Scopes the breakdown to North Campus from the previous turn
Lists units such as MedSurg, ICU, and Oncology with lower occupancy

results.question: Switching to emergency-department wait times: which hospital has the longest average ED wait, and what is it?
results.expected: North Campus has the longest average ED wait at about 30.5 minutes, ahead of West Tower (~24.4 min) and City General (~23.3 min). The report-wide average ED wait is ~26 minutes.
results.actual: North Campus has the longest average ED wait at 30.45 minutes.
results.rationale: Correctly identifies North Campus at ~30.5 minutes, satisfying both assertions. Slightly less complete than expected - it omits the comparative figures for West Tower and City General and the report-wide average.

assertions.text: Identifies North Campus as having the longest average ED wait
States North Campus ED wait close to 30 minutes (≈30.5)

results.question: Finally, what are the total encounters and the average length of stay reported here?
results.expected: Total Encounters is 100 and Average Length of Stay is about 0.64 days.
results.actual: Total encounters: 100; Average length of stay: 0.64 days.
results.rationale: Both values match the expected exactly.

assertions.text: States average length of stay of approximately 0.64 days
